mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE c WHERE c.CREATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND c.CREATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE c LEFT JOIN ONLINE_COURSE oc ON oc.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE ofc ON ofc.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID WHERE ( (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' AND oc.STATUS = 'OPEN') OR (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'OFFLINE' AND ofc.STATUS = 'OPEN') )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1

SELECT NVL(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1), 0) FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1

SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(cls.PROGRESS_RATE), 1), 0) FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1

SELECT CASE c.COURSE_TYPE WHEN 'ONLINE' THEN '온라인 강의' WHEN 'OFFLINE' THEN '오프라인 강의' ELSE c.COURSE_TYPE END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM COURSE c LEFT JOIN ONLINE_COURSE oc ON oc.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE ofc ON ofc.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID WHERE ( (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' AND oc.STATUS = 'OPEN') OR (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'OFFLINE' AND ofc.STATUS = 'OPEN') )
GROUP BY c.COURSE_TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT c.COURSE_TYPE AS label, NVL(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY c.COURSE_TYPE ORDER BY c.COURSE_TYPE

SELECT rn AS rank, course_title AS courseTitle, category_name AS categoryName, course_type_name AS courseTypeName, application_count AS applicationCount, completion_rate AS completionRate, average_progress_rate AS averageProgressRate, quiz_correct_rate AS quizCorrectRate FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID) DESC, c.COURSE_TITLE) AS rn, c.COURSE_ID AS course_id, c.COURSE_TITLE AS course_title, CASE c.CATEGORY_TYPE WHEN 'technical' THEN '기술 역량' WHEN 'job' THEN '직무 역량' WHEN 'leadership' THEN '리더십' WHEN 'common' THEN '공통 역량' ELSE c.CATEGORY_TYPE END AS category_name, CASE c.COURSE_TYPE WHEN 'ONLINE' THEN '온라인' WHEN 'OFFLINE' THEN '오프라인' ELSE c.COURSE_TYPE END AS course_type_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID) AS application_count, ( SELECT NVL(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1), 0) FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca2 ON ca2.APPLICATION_ID = cls.APPLICATION_ID WHERE ca2.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID AND ca2.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca2.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca2.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 AND cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' ) AS completion_rate, ( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(cls.PROGRESS_RATE), 1), 0) FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca2 ON ca2.APPLICATION_ID = cls.APPLICATION_ID WHERE ca2.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID AND ca2.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca2.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca2.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 AND cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' ) AS average_progress_rate, ( SELECT NVL(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN qaa.CORRECT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1), 0) FROM QUIZ_ATTEMPT qa JOIN QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ANSWER qaa ON qaa.ATTEMPT_ID = qa.ATTEMPT_ID WHERE qa.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID AND qa.SUBMITTED_AT >= #{startDate} AND qa.SUBMITTED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 ) AS quiz_correct_rate FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY c.COURSE_ID, c.COURSE_TITLE, c.CATEGORY_TYPE, c.COURSE_TYPE ) WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY rn

SELECT rn AS rank, course_type_name AS badgeText, badge_tone AS badgeTone, course_title AS label, incomplete_count AS value FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NVL(cls.STATUS, 'NOT_STARTED') IN ('NOT_STARTED', 'IN_PROGRESS') THEN ca.APPLICATION_ID END) DESC, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NVL(cls.STATUS, 'NOT_STARTED') IN ('NOT_STARTED', 'IN_PROGRESS') THEN ca.APPLICATION_ID END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID), 0) DESC NULLS LAST, c.COURSE_TITLE ) AS rn, CASE c.COURSE_TYPE WHEN 'ONLINE' THEN '온라인' WHEN 'OFFLINE' THEN '오프라인' ELSE c.COURSE_TYPE END AS course_type_name, CASE MOD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NVL(cls.STATUS, 'NOT_STARTED') IN ('NOT_STARTED', 'IN_PROGRESS') THEN ca.APPLICATION_ID END) DESC, c.COURSE_TITLE ), 4) WHEN 1 THEN 'green' WHEN 2 THEN 'blue' WHEN 3 THEN 'orange' ELSE 'purple' END AS badge_tone, c.COURSE_TITLE AS course_title, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NVL(cls.STATUS, 'NOT_STARTED') IN ('NOT_STARTED', 'IN_PROGRESS') THEN ca.APPLICATION_ID END) AS incomplete_count FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.APPLICATION_ID = ca.APPLICATION_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY c.COURSE_ID, c.COURSE_TITLE, c.COURSE_TYPE ) WHERE rn <= 5 AND incomplete_count > 0 ORDER BY rn

SELECT skill_name AS label, application_count AS value FROM ( SELECT s.SKILL_NAME AS skill_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID) AS application_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID) DESC, s.SKILL_NAME ) AS rn FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID JOIN COURSE_SKILL cs ON cs.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID JOIN SKILL s ON s.SKILL_ID = cs.SKILL_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (s.PARENT_SKILL_ID IS NOT NULL OR NVL(s.SKILL_TYPE, 'TECH') != 'CATEGORY')
GROUP BY s.SKILL_NAME ) WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY application_count DESC, skill_name

WITH current_skills AS ( SELECT skill_id, skill_name, application_count FROM ( SELECT s.SKILL_ID AS skill_id, s.SKILL_NAME AS skill_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID) AS application_count FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID JOIN COURSE_SKILL cs ON cs.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID JOIN SKILL s ON s.SKILL_ID = cs.SKILL_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (s.PARENT_SKILL_ID IS NOT NULL OR NVL(s.SKILL_TYPE, 'TECH') != 'CATEGORY')
GROUP BY s.SKILL_ID, s.SKILL_NAME ) ), previous_skills AS ( SELECT s.SKILL_ID AS skill_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID) AS application_count FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID JOIN COURSE_SKILL cs ON cs.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID JOIN SKILL s ON s.SKILL_ID = cs.SKILL_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{previousStartDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{previousEndDate} + 1 AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (s.PARENT_SKILL_ID IS NOT NULL OR NVL(s.SKILL_TYPE, 'TECH') != 'CATEGORY')
GROUP BY s.SKILL_ID ) SELECT skill_name AS label, increase_count AS value FROM ( SELECT cs.skill_name, cs.application_count - NVL(ps.application_count, 0) AS increase_count, CASE WHEN NVL(ps.application_count, 0) = 0 THEN CASE WHEN cs.application_count = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100 END ELSE ROUND((cs.application_count - ps.application_count) / ABS(ps.application_count) * 100, 1) END AS increase_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY cs.application_count - NVL(ps.application_count, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN NVL(ps.application_count, 0) = 0 THEN CASE WHEN cs.application_count = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100 END ELSE ROUND((cs.application_count - ps.application_count) / ABS(ps.application_count) * 100, 1) END DESC, cs.skill_name ) AS rn FROM current_skills cs LEFT JOIN previous_skills ps ON ps.skill_id = cs.skill_id WHERE cs.application_count > NVL(ps.application_count, 0) ) WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY increase_count DESC, increase_rate DESC, skill_name

SELECT TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM COURSE c WHERE c.CREATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND c.CREATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM')

WITH periods AS ( SELECT period_start, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN period_start + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN period_start + 7 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 3) END AS period_end, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') || '주' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY-MM') ELSE TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY') || ' Q' || TO_CHAR(period_start, 'Q') END AS period_label FROM ( SELECT CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN #{startDate} + LEVEL - 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + ((LEVEL - 1) * 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'), LEVEL - 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q'), (LEVEL - 1) * 3) END AS period_start FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}) + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN CEIL((TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + 1) / 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'MM'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'))) + 1 ELSE FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'Q'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q')) / 3) + 1 END ) WHERE period_start < #{endDate} + 1 ), filtered_courses AS ( SELECT c.COURSE_ID FROM COURSE c WHERE 1 = 1
) SELECT periodLabel, seriesName, value FROM ( SELECT p.period_start, p.period_label AS periodLabel, '수강 신청' AS seriesName, COUNT(ca.APPLICATION_ID) AS value FROM periods p LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= p.period_start AND ca.APPLIED_AT < p.period_end AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 AND ca.COURSE_ID IN (SELECT COURSE_ID FROM filtered_courses) GROUP BY p.period_start, p.period_label UNION ALL SELECT p.period_start, p.period_label AS periodLabel, '수료' AS seriesName, COUNT(cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID) AS value FROM periods p LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= p.period_start AND cls.UPDATED_AT < p.period_end AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 AND cls.COURSE_ID IN (SELECT COURSE_ID FROM filtered_courses) GROUP BY p.period_start, p.period_label ) ORDER BY period_start, seriesName
